visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on two men sitting side-by-side in what appears to be an office. The man on the left, who is older, is dressed in a white, short-sleeved uniform shirt with epaulets and a black tie. He looks intently at the man beside him, his expression serious as he speaks. The man on the right, who is younger, is also in a light-colored shirt and a tie. He looks down, his face partially obscured, appearing to be listening or focused on something out of frame. In the upper left corner of the screen, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in white. The background is a simple, out-of-focus office interior. The camera remains static throughout the clip. A man speaks in a firm, authoritative tone, giving a clear command in Mandarin: "把问题找出来" (Find the problem). Another man responds with a quick, agreeable "是" (Yes). The first man then confirms with a decisive "OK," followed by a thoughtful "Hmm."
